issues.objection: Tags on 7.28 (non-attachment-to-praise, team-state, deliberate-action) cohere with same-tag verses across chapters. Coheres directly with 7.27; coheres with Ch 2's sthita-prajña and Ch 5's sama-darśana; coheres with Ch 4's disciplic transmission as the substrate of the right-action that compounds. STRETCHED tagging keeps the operational scope honest where metaphysical reach exceeds it. This verse is sharp and operationally robust (per chapter-7 thesis: STRONG operational analog).

notes: Doctrine-coherence test for 7.28: same-tag verses across chapters preserve consistent stance; the verse extends the doctrine without contradicting prior chapters. PASS.
